description: Curated competitor ad reference images for visual comparison grading. Each ad type maps to 2 reference images from output/ads/research/ that represent professional quality for that category.

comparison.visual_qualities: Bold split layout, clear visual contrast between sides, strong headline dominance, professional typography

feature-grid.visual_qualities: Varied card sizing, clean grid layout, real dashboard feel, professional iconography

social-proof.visual_qualities: Strong testimonial treatment, realistic device mockups, screenshot-as-proof patterns

minimal-text.visual_qualities: Bold headline-dominant layout, minimal clutter, strong visual hierarchy, confident spacing

founder-proof.visual_qualities: Person + proof combination, natural photo integration, credibility markers

screenshot-social-proof.visual_qualities: Screenshot-as-element pasted look, realistic platform UI, drop shadow treatment

device-mockup.visual_qualities: Realistic device frame, clean screen content, professional product showcase

scoring_dimensions.name: visual_hierarchy
scoring_dimensions.description: Headline dominance, eye flow, information layering

scoring_dimensions.name: professional_polish
scoring_dimensions.description: Looks like a real Meta ad vs obvious AI generation tells

scoring_dimensions.name: scroll_stopping_power
scoring_dimensions.description: Feed scroll-stop effectiveness at mobile size
